prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约1160→909→777→990→891名，近5年呈波动下行趋势，2025年基准约891名。2023年曾下探至777名低点，2024年反弹至990名后20 25年回落至891名，整体在800–1000名区间波动；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021–2022年75人、2023–2024年74人、2025年73人，呈逐年微降趋势；2026年（§ 7文件）计划72人，较2025年再减1人（缩招约1.4%），招生名额持续小幅收紧，对竞争有一定加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国 大学排名从2021年第15名持续上升至2025–2026年第11名，稳居全国顶尖高校前列，学校层次对高分考生吸引力持续增强；2026年高考周期内，北航因杨昀师德 失范与学术不端事件受到舆论关注，声誉评价为明显负面，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用。抖音热度方面，北航在总排名中位列第56名（较热），国防七子话题有一 定曝光度；北航拥有航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、材料科学与工程、仪器科学与技术、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程等7个A+学科， 以及信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程等A类学科，学科实力顶尖，对理工类考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航核 心招生专业大类持续高热推荐，社会关注度高；福建省2026年物理类考生估算约20.5万人，较2025年19.2万人增加约6.7%，考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧。；北航位于北京，属全国性招生高校，在福建省无特殊地域偏好；福建省考生赴京求学意愿较强，无显著地域阻力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位 次891名、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（72人 vs 73人）、福建省物理类考生明显增加（+6.7%）、学校排名持续上升、声誉负面舆情等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约869名，区间770–968名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1160 → 909 → 777 → 990 → 891, showing a fluctuating downward trend over the past 5 years, with a baseline of about 891 in 2025. In 2023, it dipped to a low of 777, rebounded to 990 in 2024, and fell back to 891 in 2025, fluctuating within the 800–1000 range. The enrollment plan for this university in Fujian's Physics Category was 75 students in 2021–2022, 74 in 2023–2024, and 73 in 2025, showing a slight annual decrease. In 2026 (document §7), the plan is 72 students, a reduction of 1 compared to 2025 (a decrease of about 1.4%), with enrollment quotas continuing to tighten slightly, which may intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2025–2026, consistently among the top universities in China. The university's level continues to attract high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Beihang has attracted public attention due to Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic integrity incident, with a clearly negative reputation evaluation, which may inhibit some students' willingness to apply. In terms of Douyin popularity, Beihang ranks 56th (relatively popular), with some exposure from the 'Defense Seven Sons' topic. Beihang has 7 A+ disciplines: Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, Biomedical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, as well as A-level disciplines like Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. Its academic strength is top-tier, strongly attracting science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other core majors at Beihang continue to be highly recommended with high social attention. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian is about 205,000, an increase of about 6.7% from 192,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, a nationally recruiting university with no special regional preference in Fujian. Fujian students have a strong willingness to study in Beijing, with no significant regional resistance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 891, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (72 vs. 73), the significant increase in Fujian Physics Category examinees (+6.7%), the continuous rise in university ranking, and negative reputation incidents, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 869, with a range of 770–968.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science)
- Artificial Intelligence (Excellent Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Excellent Talent Training Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Engineer Project-Based Education Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Aviation)
- Science Experimental Class (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross Experimental Class)
- Chemistry (Top-Notch Student Training Program)
- Science Experimental Class (Sino-French Engineer Institute).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 770–968, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (such as Future Aerospace Leading Program, Computing and Intelligent Science, etc.), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 770), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 950), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as safety. Beihang's majors in Fujian's Physics Category are mainly Engineering Experimental Class categories, with分流 after enrollment. When applying, pay attention to the specific分流 policies.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 674 → 663 → 599 → 554 → 598, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall. In 2024, it dipped to a low of 554, and in 2025 it rebounded to 598, with a fluctuation range of about 554–663 in the past three years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 11 students in 2021–2022, 10 in 2023–2024, and 7 in 2025, showing a clear reduction trend. In 2026, the plan is 7 students, the same as 2025, indicating that enrollment numbers have stabilized at a low level.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 11th in the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the top universities in China, and has strong brand appeal for History Category candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Beihang's reputation evaluation is significantly negative due to the Yang Yun incident, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity is relatively high, but the History Category only offers one major, the Social Science Experimental Class, so the impact of reputation is limited. Beihang's Foreign Language and Literature is an A-class discipline, which has some relevance to the History Category major (Social Science Experimental Class includes Economics, Administrative Management, Law, etc.). The law discipline evaluation is not separately listed, but Beihang's overall disciplinary strength is strong. The History Category major is the Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Economics, Administrative Management, etc.). Law popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Finance/Economics/Administrative Management popularity is divided and wait-and-see, overall popularity is neutral to stable. In Fujian Province, the estimated number of History Category candidates in 2026 is about 63,000, an increase of about 4.5% from 60,000 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Beihang is located in Beijing, with no special regional preference for History Category candidates from Fujian Province. Candidates' willingness to study in Beijing is normal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 598, the enrollment plan remaining unchanged (7 students), a slight increase in History Category candidates (+4.5%), and negative reputation public opinion, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 588, with a range of 521–655.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Artificial Intelligence-Administrative Management, Law-Artificial Intelligence Dual Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang University only offers one major, the Social Science Experimental Class, for History Category in Fujian Province (2026 plan: 7 students), with no tier selection options. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 521–655 can consider applying. This major includes Artificial Intelligence-Administrative Management and Law-Artificial Intelligence Dual Bachelor's Degree Programs, with obvious interdisciplinary characteristics, suitable for candidates interested in the intersection of social sciences and artificial intelligence. Due to the extremely small enrollment (only 7 students), ranking fluctuations carry high risk. It is recommended that candidates with rankings significantly above the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 520) can boldly apply, while those with rankings near the lower limit (e.g., around 650) should be cautious.
